modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live chat session and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a short and minimally polite tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be a few minor typos and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to connect to multiple USD web pages, receiving errors.

full_description_text: 
Today, when I arrived at my desk, I tried to access Link.usd.edu and encountered a Secure Connection Error message. The browser displayed "This site can’t be reached" and the ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED error. I also got a 503 error while attempting to open link.usd.edu/docusign in both Chrome and Edge. Interestingly, I can still log into 25live and 25Live Pro without any issues, which is a bit odd given the connection problems with the other sites.
